name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Classic underarm bag, 😀currently a popular vintage shop style, many bloggers and influencers are hunting for it, willing to spend thousands on a pre-owned piece, it's worth it! Strap is adjustable, can be hand-held or underarm, flexible enough to add a chain for a crossbody bag, truly a versatile classic!
Size: 21/5/14cm, 18/16
